name: Awin API
description: The Awin API provides programmatic access to the Awin affiliate marketing network. It enables publishers (affiliates) and advertisers to retrieve transaction data, performance reports, programme information, commission groups, and creative assets. The API supports both Publisher and Advertiser account types with role-specific endpoints.
